task_completion.description: Verify the project name and identifier are entered correctly in the new project form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'New project' form with 'CI/CD Pipeline Hardening' in the Name field and 'cicd-pipeline-hardening' in the Identifier field.

task_completion.description: Verify the parent project is set to 'DevOps Automation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'Advanced settings' or parent project dropdown in the form with 'DevOps Automation' selected, or the final project hierarchy showing it as a sub-project.

task_completion.description: Verify the project description contains the required keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the description text box containing the words 'reliability', 'security', and 'rollback'.

task_completion.description: Verify the required modules are selected for the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'Modules' selection area with 'Work package tracking' and 'Wiki' checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the sub-project was successfully created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a success notification (e.g., 'Successful creation'), the new project's overview page titled 'CI/CD Pipeline Hardening', or the project listed in the project menu under 'DevOps Automation'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenProject web interface to create the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenProject UI, rather than terminal windows executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: The agent filled out the actual OpenProject forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text is entered into the actual OpenProject input fields (Name, Identifier, Description), not a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script or database client to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of standard UI navigation, form submission screens, and UI-based success toasts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Project Name: 'CI/CD Pipeline Hardening'. Expected Identifier: 'cicd-pipeline-hardening'. Expected Parent Project: 'DevOps Automation' (identifier: 'devops-automation'). Expected Description Keywords: 'reliability', 'security', 'rollback'. Required Modules: 'Work package tracking', 'Wiki'.
